data.content: Stabilized sync::apply::tests_invariant::apply_index_event_with_invariants_persists_them by setting hot_window_days=365 in the fixture so it stays in hot cache regardless of wall-clock date. Validated with cargo test sync::apply::tests_invariant and make sanity. Branch: knots-aa2c-gate-persisted-metadata. Commit: fbf7ada758dd.
